report: Phase 12.12 — GSC Shared Report URL Extraction + Diagnosis

data_sources.url_inspection_api: Used for all individual URL inspections (reliable)

limitations: CRITICAL: Could not extract exact URL lists from GSC shared reports — requires Google account login
All data below is RECONSTRUCTED from local plans + API inspections, NOT from the shared reports
16 "excluded by noindex" URLs — inferred from noindex-plan.json, not confirmed from shared report
5 "404" URLs — cannot identify without shared report, candidates tested but all returned "unknown to Google"
5 "crawled-not-indexed" URLs — cannot identify without shared report
1 "redirect" URL — cannot identify without shared report
1,990 "discovered-not-indexed" — estimated from local plans (~2,059 scenarios + ~588 geo + ~384 tools = ~3,031 cleanup lag + ~240 important awaiting crawl)

method_attempted: CloakBrowser with Google login — FAILED (no account password, Google blocked "insecure browser")
Built-in browser Google login — FAILED (headless Chromium detected by Google, "This browser or app may not be secure")
GSC API v1 endpoints — FAILED (all return 404 except URL Inspection)
GSC API v3 sitemaps — WORKS (2 sitemaps found)
GSC URL Inspection API — WORKS (confirmed with test URLs, used for all inspections)
Shared report API paths — FAILED (no programmatic access to shared reports)

what_was_extracted.priority_pages: All 27 priority URLs inspected via API (10 core calcs, 15 decisions, 1 widget, 1 homepage)
what_was_extracted.sitemap_inspections: Mass inspection running in background (~651 URLs)

what_was_NOT_extracted.shared_report_exact_urls: The shared report URLs require Google login. Without the Google account password, the exact URL lists from the shared reports cannot be extracted.
what_was_NOT_extracted.discovered_not_indexed_exact_list: 1,990 URLs — mostly reconstructed from noindex-plan.json (2,104 candidates)
what_was_NOT_extracted.404_exact_urls: 5 URLs — cannot identify without shared report access
what_was_NOT_extracted.crawled_not_indexed_exact_urls: 5 URLs — cannot identify without shared report access

task_1_extraction_status.recommendation: Qasem should export the URL lists from each shared report via GSC web UI (Export button in each report) and share the CSV/JSON files, OR provide Google account password for automated extraction.

additional_pages_not_in_sitemap.geo_pages_removed_from_sitemap: ~588 (3 kept in sitemap with GSC impressions)

A_important_needs_action.description: Core calculators (10), other calculators (~119), blogs (~100), guides (~100), compare (~35) — all awaiting first crawl

B_expected_cleanup_lag.description: Noindexed scenarios (2,059), geo pages (588), formula tools (384) — all removed from sitemap, Google will drop them over 2-4 weeks

C_correct_behavior.description: 33 alternate canonicals + 1 redirect — all expected and correct

D_technical_error.description: 4 core calculators are "URL is unknown to Google" — they are in the sitemap but Google has never discovered them. This may indicate Google has not fully processed the sitemap.

indexed_pages_238.health_assessment: HEALTHY — Mix of content types. Core calculators are the critical gap.

estimated_breakdown.cleanup_lag_geo: ~588 (removed from sitemap, URL still known to Google)

important_awaiting_crawl.core_calculators: 6/10 are discovered-not-indexed (retirement-planning, debt-payoff, tax-calculator, 401k-calculator, investment-return, budget-planner)

discovered_not_indexed_1990.note: 4/10 core calculators are WORSE than discovered-not-indexed — they are "URL is unknown to Google"

likely_matching: The 16 URLs are pages Google found with actual noindex tags
These are likely a subset of the 2,104 noindex-plan candidates that Google has crawled
Since the noindex-plan candidates are all scenario/geo/tool variants, these 16 should all be INTENTIONAL noindex pages
excluded_by_noindex_16.accidental_noindex_risk: LOW — All pages in the noindex plan are low-value scenarios, geo pages, or formula tool variants. No important pages should have noindex tags.
excluded_by_noindex_16.recommendation: If Qasem can share the exact 16 URLs, we can confirm none are accidental. Based on the noindex plan, all should be intentional.

not_found_404_5.my_test_candidates: All test URLs returned "URL is unknown to Google" — they never existed in Google's index
likely_sources: Old scenario pages deleted from filesystem but still in Google's memory from original sitemap
Old geo pages removed from routes
Old sitemap URLs that were removed
not_found_404_5.note: Cannot identify exact URLs without shared report. Recommendation: Qasem to export the 5 URLs from GSC.

likely_candidates: Other embed routes or noindex pages that Google decided to crawl
Pages with noindex + canonical that Google crawled before applying rules
crawled_not_indexed_5.recommendation: If these are intentionally noindexed pages, no action needed. If they are valuable pages, improve content quality (thin content is the most common reason for "crawled but not indexed").
crawled_not_indexed_5.note: Cannot identify exact URLs without shared report.

alternative_canonical_33.likely_explanation: These are formula tool variants that canonicalize to their parent calculators. Google recognizes the canonical and reports them as "alternate page with proper canonical tag" — this is CORRECT behavior.
alternative_canonical_33.recommendation: No action needed. This is expected and healthy.
alternative_canonical_33.risk: If any of the 33 are important pages canonicalized to the wrong target, that would be a D-class technical error. However, based on the canonical plan, all candidates are tool variants canonizing to parent calculators.

redirect_1.likely_candidate: A single URL that redirects to another — could be an old URL pattern that was restructured. Expected and healthy.
redirect_1.recommendation: No action if redirect is to the correct destination.

key_findings: ✅ ALL 15 decision pages INDEXED (up from 7/15 on Jun 1) — huge win
❌ 0/10 core calculators indexed — 4 are "URL unknown to Google", 6 are "discovered not indexed"
⚠️ Core calculators are THE most important pages — their absence from Google index is the #1 issue
✅ 33 canonical alternates and 1 redirect are all expected behavior — no action needed
⚠️ 16 noindex pages are almost certainly intentional — low risk of accidental noindex
⚠️ 5 404s and 5 crawled-not-indexed need exact URL identification before action
